projects.title: Retail KPI Storytelling
projects.tagline: Sales, customers, and stores turned into RFM segments and YTD/MTD KPIs.
projects.summary: Formation Data & Business Intelligence project on a retail dataset covering Sales, Product, Customer, and Store tables. I built the full analytical path from relational modeling and advanced SQL through cleaning, RFM segmentation, time-based KPIs, and visual storytelling for business questions.
projects.problem: Stakeholders needed a clear view of who buys, what sells, and how performance moves month-to-month — not a pile of raw retail tables.
projects.approach: Modeled the four-table retail schema, wrote advanced SQL (joins, CTEs, window functions, views), cleaned and transformed sales data in Python, built RFM customer segments, and designed YTD/MTD KPI views with Matplotlib and Seaborn so trends were scannable.
projects.impact: Delivered a repeatable analytics path: RFM segments for customer prioritization, YTD/MTD KPI views for recurring review, and charts framed for stakeholder decisions rather than exploratory notebooks alone.
highlights: Queried a 4-table retail schema with joins, subqueries, CTEs, window functions, views, and stored procedures.
Built RFM customer segments and Year-to-Date / Month-to-Date KPI views from cleaned sales data.
Used pandas and NumPy for exploration, then Matplotlib and Seaborn to present trends stakeholders could act on — hierarchy of KPIs first, detail second.

projects.title: Trusted Test Data Reporting
projects.tagline: Large validation datasets cleaned, tracked, and turned into decisions.
projects.summary: At Capgemini Engineering and KPIT Engineering, I analyzed and validated large Hardware-in-the-Loop and system test datasets, automated collection workflows in JIRA, and delivered clear reports for hardware, software, and systems teams.
projects.problem: Cross-functional engineering teams needed faster, trustworthy answers from high-volume test and diagnostic data — manual collation slowed decisions and hid anomalies.
projects.approach: Validated large-scale HiL and system test datasets, automated data collection and defect tracking in JIRA, and wrote Python scripts to generate result data and reporting for hardware, software, and systems stakeholders.
projects.impact: Moved reporting from ad-hoc manual collation to a repeatable JIRA-backed workflow with clearer anomaly visibility and faster turnaround for cross-functional reviews.
highlights: Validated large-scale Hardware-in-the-Loop and system test datasets, surfacing performance trends and anomalies for engineering teams.
Automated data collection and defect-tracking workflows in JIRA to improve traceability and cut analysis turnaround.
Built Python scripts to generate and analyze result data, improving reporting accuracy for hardware, software, and systems stakeholders.

projects.title: Friends of Figma (FoF) Tunisia
projects.tagline: Official Friends of Figma Tunisia chapter - 290 members and growing.
projects.summary: I founded and lead Friends of Figma (FoF) Tunisia, listed on the official Friends of Figma network as Tunisia’s chapter for Africa. As Figma Community Advocate and organizer, I grow a local space for designers and builders through meetups, Config watch parties, speaker programs, and learning in public — the same communication craft I bring to stakeholder-facing data work.
projects.problem: Tunisia lacked an official Figma-affiliated community space for designers and builders to learn together in public.
projects.approach: Founded and organized FoF Tunisia: meetups, Config watch parties, speaker programs, and partnerships with WTM and GDG — connecting design practice with clear public storytelling.
projects.impact: 290 members on the official FoF network; hosted Tunisia Config Watch Party 2026 and recurring meetups; speaking at DevFest, GDG MENAT Summit, and Women Techmakers.
highlights: Official organizer of Friends of Figma Tunisia (290 members on friends.figma.com/tunisia).
Hosted Tunisia Config Watch Party 2026 and meetups such as Vibe Right with Figma and Ramadhan Bytes: Design Edition.
Connect design and data storytelling through talks at DevFest, GDG MENAT Summit 2025, and Women Techmakers.

timeline.text: Started co-organizing Google Developer Group meetups and became a Women Techmakers Ambassador.
Qualified Top 10 at the AI Artathon during the Global AI Summit in Riyadh.
Product Owner at UTIK - translating stakeholder needs into data-informed product specs and backlog priorities.
Completed a Master’s in Electronics (Microelectronics & Instrumentation) at Monastir University. Joined Capgemini Engineering.
Founded Friends of Figma (FoF) Tunisia - Tunisia’s only Figma-affiliated community chapter.
Completed Women Developer Academy. Presented a Capgemini Tech Talk and kept growing community programs.
Spoke at DevFest and GDG MENAT Summit in Dubai. Continued data validation, reporting, and storytelling work at KPIT Engineering.
Completed Formation Data & Business Intelligence (SQL, Python, RFM, visualization). Hosted Tunisia Config Watch Party 2026 with Friends of Figma Tunisia. Joined Technovation WTM Media Council.

aboutPage.title: About me in 2 minutes
aboutPage.bio: I’m Amani, a Data Analyst in Ariana, Tunisia. I analyze complex datasets and build KPI narratives with SQL and Python — with a designer’s eye for clarity. I also lead Friends of Figma Tunisia as Figma Community Advocate, which sharpens how I communicate with stakeholders.
